name: Nicola
subtitle: the keeper on the riverboat

ultimate_ability.label: The Tideline
ultimate_ability.description: Once per game, mark a guest's place at the table. The next time you bring them anything, both of you are also bringing each other a memory neither of you knew you still had.

notes: Nicola's hand is the keeper's loop — PLANT / TEND / HARVEST / SET THE TABLE as starters instead of the Fool's waiter-loop, the Magician's maker-loop, the Priestess's listener-loop. Buyable pool is the GARDEN (recurring crops + cuttings that bear over multiple turns). Second stat is BLOOM (rises good — the boat is in season, the guests are full, the river is generous). Doubt's opposite. Insight is replaced by HARVEST (countable crops in the pantry). Spec: lore/_TAROT_GAUNTLET_SCENARIOS.md.
